summary: Added a deterministic Bash Dependabot contract check for required weekly github-actions and cargo update entries rooted at `/`, exposed it through a dedicated just target, and wired it into `just check`.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: Add a deterministic shell checker for .github/dependabot.yml.
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: scripts/dependabot-contract-check.sh parses Dependabot update entries with awk and reports file-scoped errors through the same style as existing contract checks.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: Require weekly github-actions and cargo update entries rooted at /.
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: scripts/dependabot-contract-check.sh requires matching `package-ecosystem`, `directory`, and `schedule.interval` values within the same update entry; `bash scripts/dependabot-contract-check.sh` passed in evidence/m4-dependabot-contract-check/commands.log.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: Wire the check into just check through a dedicated just target.
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: justfile defines `dependabot-contract-check` and `check` invokes it with the other contract checks.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: Write qd completion and audit reports and note that macOS validation is not required.
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: reports/qd/m4-dependabot-contract-check/completion.json and reports/qd/m4-dependabot-contract-check/audit.json record repository metadata validation with macOS validation not required.

realWorldValidation.evidence: Repository metadata contract check only; native macOS validation is not required.
